footerNav.name: Footer Navigation
footerNav.description: Mobile bottom navigation bar with icon + label tabs

topBanners.name: Top Banners
topBanners.description: Full-width promotional banners at top of pages

recreationGuide.description: How to recreate menus and banners using text-to-figma tools
recreationGuide.footerNav: const footer = create_frame({ name: 'Footer Nav', layoutMode: 'HORIZONTAL', itemSpacing: 0, width: 390, height: 64, horizontalSizing: 'FIXED' }); set_fills({ nodeId: footer.frameId, color: '#1D092F' }); set_stroke({ nodeId: footer.frameId, strokeWeight: 1, strokeColor: '#3D1F50', strokeAlign: 'INSIDE' }); apply_effects({ nodeId: footer.frameId, effects: [{ type: 'DROP_SHADOW', x: 0, y: 8, blur: 24, spread: 0, color: '#1D092F', opacity: 0.25 }] }); set_layout_align({ nodeId: footer.frameId, primaryAxis: 'SPACE_BETWEEN', counterAxis: 'CENTER' });
recreationGuide.navItem: const navItem = create_frame({ name: 'Nav Item', parentId: footer.frameId, layoutMode: 'VERTICAL', itemSpacing: 4, padding: 8, horizontalSizing: 'FILL', verticalSizing: 'FILL' }); set_layout_align({ nodeId: navItem.frameId, primaryAxis: 'CENTER', counterAxis: 'CENTER' }); // Add icon instance (24×24); const label = create_text({ content: 'Home', parentId: navItem.frameId, fontSize: 10, color: '#CEB6D8', textAlign: 'CENTER' });
recreationGuide.activeState: // For active state: set_fills({ nodeId: iconId, color: '#25ECFF' }); set_fills({ nodeId: label.nodeId, color: '#25ECFF' }); set_text_properties({ nodeId: label.nodeId, fontWeight: 700 });
recreationGuide.topBanner: const banner = create_frame({ name: 'Top Banner', layoutMode: 'HORIZONTAL', itemSpacing: 24, padding: 32, width: 1200, horizontalSizing: 'FILL', verticalSizing: 'HUG' }); add_gradient_fill({ nodeId: banner.frameId, type: 'LINEAR', angle: 90, stops: [{ position: 0, color: '#9B4DFF' }, { position: 1, color: '#C6FF77' }] }); set_corner_radius({ nodeId: banner.frameId, radius: 8 }); apply_effects({ nodeId: banner.frameId, effects: [{ type: 'DROP_SHADOW', x: 0, y: 2, blur: 8, spread: 0, color: '#1D092F', opacity: 0.15 }] }); const headline = create_text({ content: 'Limited Time Offer!', parentId: banner.frameId, fontSize: 24, fontWeight: 700, color: '#FFFFFF' });
